name: The Carrion Virus
text: You cannot ready Organic Webbing upgrades. When Revealed: Exhaust each of your Organic Webbing upgrades. Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Kaine → remove this obligation from the game.

name: The Jackal's Obsession
text: “Through my perfected cloning techniques, I, THE JACKAL, will bring Gwen Stacy back to life.” -Miles Warren, the Jackal When Revealed: Place 1[per_hero] threat here. [crisis]

name: Jackal
text: Quickstrike. When Defeated: Confuse your identity. Search the encounter deck and set-aside area for the Clone Saga environment and put it into play. (Scarlet Spider's nemesis minion.)

name: Clone Saga
text:
Surge. Jackal gains surge.
The unique rule does not apply to characters in play.
Each [[clone ]]minion gains each [[trait ]]of the identity engaged with them.

name: Clone
text: Forced Interrupt: When a character other than your identity attacks Clone, discard the top card of your deck. If that card's printed cost is odd, resolve that attack against your identity instead.

flavor: “The die is cast!”
name: Peter Parker's Conciousness
text: Forced Response: After an ally you control leaves play, discard the top 8 cards of your deck. Alter-Ego Action: Spend [mental][mental] resources and read this card's flavor text → remove this card from the game.

name: Limitless Power
text: Supernova has been imprisoned by the Superior Spider-Man for months. Now she's back with a vengeance and incredible power. Supernova gets +1 ATK and +1 THW. Supernova cannot be defeated. [acceleration]

flavor: “Spider-Man will pay for what he did to me!”
name: Supernova
text: [star] Forced Interrupt: When Supernova activates against you, deal 1 damage to each character you control and place 1 threat on each scheme. (Superior Spider-Man's nemesis minion.)

name: Explosion of Power
text: When Revealed: Take 4 indirect damage. Discard cards from the top of your deck until you discard an [energy] resource. Add that card to your hand. [star] Boost: Take 1 indirect damage.

name: Dynamo Assault
text: Surge. When Revealed: Discard 2 cards from the top of the encounter deck and each player deck.

name: Sonic Vulnerability
text: Flip Symbiotic Bond to its [[bonded ]]side. Treat the printed text box of Symbiotic Bond as if it were blank. Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Eddie Brock and take 1 damage → discard this obligation.

name: Fire Vulnerability
text:
If Symbiotic Bond is [[bonded]], take 2 indirect damage. Discard this obligation.
If Symbiotic Bond is attached to an ally, deal 3 damage to that ally. Discard this obligation.

name: Maximum Carnage
text: Carnage and his lover Shriek are committing a murder spree across Manhattan. Venom and Spider-Man reluctantly agree to work together to stop his rampage. Hinder 2[per_hero]. Assault. When Defeated: Deal 1 damage to each hero. [crisis]

name: Carnage
text: Villainous. [star] Forced Interrupt: When Carnage would scheme against you, he attacks an ally you control instead, if able. (Venom's nemesis minion.) “I'M GOING TO PAINT THE TOWN RED!!!!”

name: Shriek
text: Villainous. Patrol. [star] Forced Interrupt: When Shriek attacks, if Carnage is in play, give her 1 additional boost card for this activation. “My sonic scream didn't hurt you, did it? I get angry when someone's hurting my man...”

name: Sonic Boom
text: When Revealed: Either spend [energy][mental][physical] resources or exhaust each character you control. [star] Boost: If this activation deals damage to you, exhaust your hero.

name: Paint the Town Red
text: Attach to Carnage. If you cannot, attach to a minion. Forced Interrupt: After attached minion attacks you, deal 1 damage to each character you control. [star] Boost: Deal 1 damage to each character you control.

flavor: “I can liquefy your brains with these vibrations!”
name: Shocker
text: Steady. When Defeated: Remove 5 threat from a side scheme. Flip this card.

flavor: “I can liquefy your bones with these vibrations!”
name: Shocker
text: Steady. In expert mode, Shocker gains stalwart. When Defeated: Deal 1 damage to each hero. Remove 10 threat from a side scheme. Flip this card.

name: Shock Party
text: Contents: Shocker (A). (Shocker (B) instead for expert mode.) Shocker, City in Chaos, Power Drain II, and Standard III encounters sets. One modular encounter set (recommended: Crime Wave). Setup: Search the encounter deck for The Long Night side scheme and reveal it. Remove each obligation card in the encounter deck from the game.

flavor: New York City has lost power, a blackout. Shocker is lighting up Times Square, claiming responsibility and looking for a fight.
name: Shock Party
text: When Revealed: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for the Vibro-Shock Gauntlets attachment and reveal it.

name: Look Who Finally Showed
text: When Revealed: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for the Rhino minion and put him into play engaged with the first player. Search the encounter deck and discard pile for the Grand Larceny side scheme and reveal it. (Shuffle.)

flavor: “We're getting paid to rob a bank? Hahaha, that's a win-win! My two favorite things - breakin...and takin!”
name: Look Who Finally Showed
text: Forced Response: After Shocker or Rhino is defeated, remove 1[per_hero] threat from this scheme.

flavor: Shocker puts out the call for all of New York's super villains to aid him in killing the heroes, promising them a cut of his pay.
name: The Gang's All Here
text: When Revealed: In player order, each player not engaged with unique minion ([unique]) searches the encounter deck and discard pile for a unique minion ([unique]) and reveals it.

flavor: Shocker has new tech and powerful allies. Their only goal - create chaos and terror.
name: The Gang's All Here
text: Vibro-Shock Gauntlets gains permanent. If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.

name: Vibro-Shock Gauntlets
text: Attach to Shocker. [star] Forced Response: AfterShocker attacks and damages you, discard a card from your hand. Hero Action: Spend [mental][physical] resources and remove a stunned or confused status card from Shocker → discard Vibro-Shock Gauntlets. [star]Boost: Reveal this card.

flavor: "I need the money for my Daughter! Kingpin better pay up..." -Sandman
name: Sandman
text: Toughness. [star] Forced Response: After Sandman attacks or engages you, discard the top 6 cards of the encounter deck.

flavor: "Sup Spiders? Ready for pain?" -Scorpion
name: Scorpion
text: Forced Response (Hero): After Scorpion engages you, stun your hero.

flavor: "I trust that the kingpin will pay. I trust you less, Shocker..." -Vulture
name: Vulture
text: Quickstrike. Forced Response: After Vulture engages you, discard 1 random card from your hand unless your identity has the [[aerial ]] trait.

name: Feedback
text: When Revealed: Stun your identity and Shocker. Discard your hand. Draw up to your hand size. [star] Boost: Discard your hand. Draw up to your hand size.

name: Ionic Boots
text: Attach to Shocker. [star] Forced Response: After Shocker attacks and damages you, place 2 threat on the main scheme. Hero Action: Spend [energy][mental][physical] resources → discard this card.

flavor: Criminals in New York are on a a crime spree, robbing every business they come across.
name: Grand Larceny
text: Threat cannot be removed from The Long Night. Hero Response (thwart): After a [[criminal ]]minion is defeated, remove 5 threat from Grand Larceny. [crisis]

name: The Getaway
text: When Revealed: Choose one: • Heal 3 damage from Shocker. Shocker schemes. • If the Vibro-Shock Gauntlets attachment is not in play, search the encounter deck and discard pile for it and reveal it.

name: The Check Cleared
text: Surge. When Revealed: Place threat on The Long Night equal to the combined SCH of each [[criminal ]]enemy in play.

flavor: “I bet you're shocked to see me.”
name: Get Shocked!
text: When Revealed: Stun your identity. Deal 1 damage to each hero. [star] Boost: Discard your hand. Draw up to your hand size.

name: The Long Night
text: Permanent. Hinder 15[per_hero]. The players cannot win unless they survive the night. Reponse: After a [[criminal ]]minion is defeated, remove 2 threat from The Long Night. Forced Interrupt: When the last threat is removed from this scheme, the players survive the night and win the game.

name: Power Drain
text: When Defeated: Discard 2 cards from the encounter deck. Each player must choose and discard 1 resource of any type from their hand for each boost icon discarded this way. [acceleration]

name: Electro
text: [star] Forced Response: After Electro attacks you, discard 1 card from the encounter deck. Take 1 indirect damage for each boost icon discarded this way. [star] Boost: Discard 3 cards from the encounter deck.

name: Electromagnetic Pulse
text: When Revealed: Discard 7 cards from the encounter deck. If an Electro minion was discarded this way, put that minion into play engaged with you. If Electro was not discarded this way, this card gains surge. [star] Boost: Discard 3 cards from the encounter deck.

name: Lightning Bolt
text: When Revealed: Discard 2 cards from the encounter deck. Take 1 indirect damage for each boost icon discarded this way. [star] Boost: Discard 3 cards from the encounter deck.

name: Shock Therapy
text: When Revealed: Discard 1[per_hero] cards from the encounter deck. The villain heals 1 damage for each boost icon discarded this way. [star] Boost: Discard 3 cards from the encounter deck.

name: Electro
text: [star] Electro gets +1 hit point for each [energy] resource attached to her. [star] Forced Response: After Electro engages you or activates against you, choose 1 card from your hand with a printed [energy] resource and attach it to her.

flavor: "You think that's bad? You just wait!"
name: Electro
text: Forced Response: After Electro activates against you, discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until a treachery is discarded.

name: Electro
text: When Revealed: Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until a copy of A.I.M. Scientist is discarded. Put it into play engaged with the first player. Forced Response: After Electro activates against you, discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until a treachery is discarded.

name: Electro
text: Forced Response: After Electro activates against you, discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until a treachery with 1 or more boost icons is discarded. Then, discard an equal number of cards from the top of your deck.

flavor: Electro has teamed up with A.I.M. to help boost his already deadly electricity abilities. With access to dark matter energy, pure electricity form, and even electric clones of himself, he's no joke anymore.
name: Energized!
text: Contents: Electro (I) and Electro (II). (Electro (II) and Electro (III) instead for expert.) Electro, Power Drain, and Standard encounter sets. 1 modular encounter set (Sinister Assault). Setup: Find the Electricty Clones and Grounded environments and put them into play. Advance to stage 1B.

name: Energized!
text: Forced Response: After step 1 of the villain phase ends, heal 1 damage from the villain for each acceleration token and icon ([acceleration]) in play. If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.

flavor: "I saw him do that in a video game once!" -Deadpool
name: Electricity Clones
text: Permanent. Electro ignores the unique rule. (Multiple copies of Electro can be in play, but "Forced Response" abilities on a copy of Electro can still only be triggered by that particular copy.)

name: Grounded
text: Permanent. While the total cost of all upgrades and supports in play is less than 10[per_hero], the villain cannot be defeated. Forced Response: After the villain is defeated, remove this card from the game [arrow] each player draws 2 cards.

name: Greased Lightning
text: Attach to the villain. The attached villain gets +1 Scheme. Forced Response: After the villain schemes, place an [acceleration] token here. Hero Action: Discard each card from the encounter deck → discard this card.

flavor: "I'm a living force of nature!"—Electro
name: Lightning Speed
text: Attach to the villain. Forced Response: After a copy of Electro enters play, place an acceleration token here. Hero Action: Discard each card from the encounter deck [acceleration] discard this card.

name: A.I.M. Scientist
text: When Defeated: Find the Dark Matter Conversion side scheme and reveal it. [star] Boost: Place an acceleration token on an ally.

flavor: "Max, there's nothing you can do that'd shock me!"
name: Black Cat
text: [star] Forced Response: After Black Cat engages you or schemes, discard the top 2 cards of the encounter deck. Deal each card with a star icon ([star]) discarded this way to yourself as a facedown encounter card.

flavor: "Drop something, pal?!" —Electro
name: Electro
text: [star] Forced Response: After Electro attacks and damages you, discard the top 7 cards of your deck. When Defeated: Remove 4 threat from a side scheme.

flavor: "Drop something, pal?!" —Electro
name: Electro
text: [star] Forced Response: After Electro attacks and damages you, discard the top 7 cards of your deck. When Defeated: Remove 4 threat from a side scheme.

flavor: "Tell me this is gonna work..." -Electro
name: Accelerated Plans
text: Forced Response: After this side scheme enters play, place 2 threat here for each acceleration icon and token in play.

flavor: "That Quantum Field Generator is no joke. It'll let Electro harness the power of Dark Matter, too." -Spider-Man
name: Dark Matter Conversion
text: The villain gets +2 ATK and gains retaliate 1. When Revealed: Place 1 additional threat here for each acceleration token and icon ([acceleration]) in play.

flavor:
"Ever heard lightning never strikes twice? All lies."
—Electro
name: Charging
text: When Revealed: Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until a minion is discarded. If that minion is Electro, put it into play and it gains quickstrike. Otherwise, this card gains surge.

name: High Voltage
text: When Revealed (Alter-Ego): Discard the top 5 cards of your deck. When Revealed (Hero): Discard the top 5 cards of the encounter deck. [star] Boost: Discard the top 3 cards of the encounter deck.

flavor: "Time to get a little extra juice!" —Electro
name: Recharging
text: When Revealed: Heal 3 damage from each copy of Electro in play. If 3 or fewer damage was healed this way, this card gains surge.

flavor: "...ouch." —Spider-Man
name: Shocked
text: When Revealed: Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck equal to the number of cards in your hand. If 3 or fewer cards were discarded this way, this card gains surge.
